{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Karoshan queen (The Last Horizon)
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Karoshan]] queen is a towering figure with great power.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c1">''The Captain'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Aliens]]
